title: All CLI subcommands: list, search, show, open, tag, delete, etc.
description:
Implement all cobra CLI subcommands and wire them into the root command in main.go.

Refer to docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-13-ccs-design.md for the full command spec.

This task depends on ccs-01-foundation (model, db), ccs-02-indexer, and ccs-03-opener.

Key context:
- Every command that reads sessions should call indexer.Sync() first to ensure the DB is fresh
- Default DB path: ~/.config/ccs/ccs.db
- Default Claude dir: ~/.claude
- Output: human-readable table by default, JSON with --json flag
- Use tabwriter or lipgloss for table formatting
- Relative timestamps: '2h ago', '3d ago', etc.
- For delete: prompt for confirmation unless --force
requirements: Create internal/cli/root.go that builds the root cobra.Command and attaches all subcommands. Export a func Execute() for main.go to call
Create internal/cli/search.go — 'ccs search <query>' with --all/-a, --tag/-t, --json. Search across name, first_message, last_message, cwd, git_branch
Create internal/cli/show.go — 'ccs show <id|name>' displays full session details: metadata, tags, message previews. Supports --json
Create internal/cli/open.go — 'ccs open <id|name>' with --new-terminal flag. Uses opener.ResolveSession then opener.OpenSession
Create internal/cli/tag.go — 'ccs tag <id|name> <tag> [tags...]' adds tags. 'ccs untag <id|name> <tag> [tags...]' removes tags
Create internal/cli/tags.go — 'ccs tags' lists all tags with session counts
Create internal/cli/projects.go — 'ccs projects' lists all known projects with session counts
Create internal/cli/delete.go — 'ccs delete <id|name>' with --force/-f. Deletes JSONL file from disk AND removes from index. Prompts for confirmation without --force
Create internal/cli/reindex.go — 'ccs reindex' forces full re-index
Create internal/cli/completion.go — 'ccs completion <bash|zsh|fish>' using cobra's built-in completion generation
Create a helper internal/cli/helpers.go with shared functions: formatRelativeTime(t time.Time) string, printTable, printJSON, getDB, getIndexer
Verify the project compiles with 'go build ./cmd/ccs/' and all tests pass with 'go test ./...'
